findings.fix: Store the instant as Instant.now() in a timestamptz column, not zoneless LocalDateTime.now().
Store the instant as Instant.now() in a timestamptz column, not zoneless LocalDateTime.now().
Use TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE (timestamptz) so the financial instant is stored as UTC.
Use TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE (timestamptz) for the payment instant.
Use TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE (timestamptz) for the webhook instant.
Use TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE (timestamptz) for the ledger-entry instant.
Count days with ChronoUnit.DAYS.between on zoned/local dates, not an epoch-second divide by 86400.
Use a half-open interval [start, next): !isBefore(start) && isBefore(end), so a boundary txn is counted once.
Read the instrument's day-count convention and compute the year fraction via a convention object, not a hardcoded /365.
